_comment: Canon: §Invariants -- baseline sha256 hashes for the R-speculative-aspects-frozen file set (Entity aspect, multi-domain federation, sub-agent recursion machinery). Enforced by test_frozen_aspects_snapshot.py. Changing a file below requires an explicit steward act: review the change, then regenerate this baseline (see test module docstring for the exact regen command). This file is the unfreezing ritual's paper trail -- a red test here means 'inward development happened on a frozen surface without a recorded steward decision', not 'something is broken'.
